SESSION=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'main') && if [ -d .tenet/journal ] && [ $(ls -1 .tenet/journal/*.jsonl 2>/dev/null | wc -l) -eq 0 ]; then echo '鈿狅笍  WARNING: No journal entry for this session.
